characters.appearance: 3D animated young boy. Pale complexion, large expressive eyes, and dark hair. He has a soft, rounded face.
Man in a classic painting. Dark, wavy hair and a full beard. He has strong facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing dark, indistinct clothing that blends into the shadows.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: English bolne mein atak jaate ho? [Do you get stuck while speaking English?] 'To be, or not to be' ki confusion chhoro! [Leave the confusion of 'To be, or not to be'!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear and hesitation of speaking English.
- Uses the visual's 'Hamlet' theme as a clever metaphor for the user's confusion.
- Establishes a warm, relatable, and encouraging tone right away.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करके अपनी English सुधारें (Improve your English by practicing for just 10 minutes a day)
"To be, or not to be — that is the question," Hamlet said softly. He stood alone in the dark hall of the castle. His face was serious and full of sadness as he thought about life and death.
to be
[tu: bi:]
होना (to be)
question
[ˈkwestʃən]
सवाल (question)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Supernova ke AI tutor ke saath roz practice karo. [Practice daily with Supernova's AI tutor.] Interview ho ya doston ke saath baat-cheet, ab bina darr ke fluent English bolo. [Whether it's an interview or chatting with friends, now speak fluent English without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as the practical, judgment-free solution.
- Highlights real-world speaking situations (interviews, friends) to show practical value.
- Ends with an empowering call-to-action to speak fluently without fear.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करके अपनी English सुधारें (Improve your English by practicing for just 10 minutes a day)
William Shakespeare
Hamlet
"To be, or not to be — that is the question," Hamlet said softly. He stood alone in the dark hall of the castle. His face was serious and full of sadness as he thought about life and death.

धीरे से (softly)

अकेला (alone)
